# Contributing

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-07 -->

## Prerequisites

| Tool | Version | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Node.js | 24 (see `.nvmrc`) | Use `nvm use` to switch; `engines.node` requires `>=22` |
| npm | 10+ | Ships with Node.js; lockfile version 2 |

`.npmrc` is configured with `ignore-scripts=true` to prevent lifecycle script execution on install.

## Getting Started

```bash
# Clone and install
git clone git@github.com:contentful/contentful-batch-libs.git
cd contentful-batch-libs
nvm use           # switches to Node 24
npm ci            # source: package-lock.json (clean install)

# Build
npm run build     # source: package.json â†’ scripts.build (runs clean + tsc)

# Run tests
npm test          # source: package.json â†’ scripts.test (runs jest)
```

## Development Workflow

```bash
# Watch mode â€” recompile on file changes
npm run build:watch    # source: package.json â†’ scripts.build:watch (tsc --watch)

# Watch tests
npm run test:watch     # source: package.json â†’ scripts.test:watch (jest --watch)
```

## Commands

| Command | What it does | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `npm run build` | Clean dist/ + compile TypeScript | `package.json â†’ scripts.build` |
| `npm run build:watch` | Incremental TypeScript compilation | `package.json â†’ scripts.build:watch` |
| `npm run clean` | Remove dist/ and coverage/ | `package.json â†’ scripts.clean` |
| `npm run lint` | ESLint on lib/ and test/ | `package.json â†’ scripts.lint` |
| `npm test` | Run Jest test suite with coverage | `package.json â†’ scripts.test` |
| `npm run test:watch` | Run tests in watch mode | `package.json â†’ scripts.test:watch` |
| `npm run test:debug` | Debug tests with Node inspector | `package.json â†’ scripts.test:debug` |

## Testing

- **Framework:** Jest 30 with ts-jest preset (`ts-jest/presets/js-with-ts`)
- **Location:** `test/` directory, files named `*.test.js`
- **Run all:** `npm test`
- **Watch mode:** `npm run test:watch`
- **Coverage:** Collected automatically from `lib/**/*`, output to `coverage/`
- **Config:** `jest.config.ts`

## Code Style & Conventions

- **Linting:** ESLint with `standard` + `eslint:recommended` + `@typescript-eslint/eslint-recommended` + `@typescript-eslint/recommended` (`.eslintrc`)
- **Module system:** Node16 (CommonJS output with TypeScript source)
- **Target:** ES2022
- **Strict mode:** TypeScript strict enabled
- **Declaration files:** Generated alongside JS output in `dist/`

## Commit Convention

This repo uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) enforced by Commitizen (`cz-conventional-changelog`):

```
type(scope): description
```

Valid types: `feat`, `fix`, `chore`, `docs`, `refactor`, `test`, `perf`, `ci`, `build`, `revert`

Examples:
```
feat: add retry logic to sequence header
fix: handle missing sys.id in entity name resolution
build(deps): bump contentful-management from 12.0.0 to 12.1.0
```

Husky is configured (`husky` devDependency) for pre-commit hooks.

**Important:** `build(deps)` with scope `deps` triggers a patch release via semantic-release rules. `feat!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE` footer triggers a major release.

## Branch Strategy

- `master` â€” production branch; releases are cut from here automatically
- `beta` â€” pre-release channel; publishes to npm with `@beta` dist-tag
- Feature branches â€” no enforced naming convention; merge via PR to `master`

## Release Process

Releases are fully automated via [semantic-release](https://github.com/semantic-release/semantic-release):

1. Merge PR to `master`
2. CI runs build + check jobs
3. `semantic-release` analyzes commits since last release
4. If releasable commits exist: bumps version, generates changelog, publishes to npm, creates GitHub release
5. Beta channel: merge to `beta` branch publishes `X.Y.Z-beta.N` to npm `@beta` tag

**Release rules:**
- `breaking: true` â†’ major
- `build(deps)` â†’ patch
- `feat` â†’ minor
- `fix` â†’ patch

## Pull Requests

- CI must pass (build, lint, test)
- At least one approval required
- Squash merge is typical
- Dependabot PRs are auto-approved and merge-requested via workflow

## CI/CD

| Job | Trigger | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| Build | Push/PR to any branch | `npm ci` + `npm run build`, caches dist/ |
| Check | After Build | Restores build cache, runs lint + test |
| Release | Push to `master` or `beta` | Runs semantic-release (changelog, npm publish, GitHub release) |
| CodeQL | Push/PR to `master` (workflow files only) | Scans GitHub Actions for security issues |
| Dependabot auto-approve | Dependabot PRs | Auto-approves and requests merge |

## File-Level Guidance

| Path | Notes |
|---|---|
| `lib/` | TypeScript source â€” all exports go through `lib/index.ts` |
| `dist/` | Generated â€” do not edit; gitignored |
| `test/` | Test files; included in npm package (`files` field) for consumer testing |
| `package-lock.json` | Committed; use `npm ci` for reproducible installs |
| `.github/workflows/` | CI/CD config â€” changes trigger CodeQL scan |
| `catalog-info.yaml` | Backstage service catalog metadata |
